text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the<n>dorms...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! I'm okay, Flower.It's not bad enough that I need to takethe day off.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... if you push yourself any more,<n>you'll
collapse from exhaustion!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Creek's caught a cold, but she<n>doesn't want to
rest. She says she<n>still has things to do...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Laundry, vacuuming, bedtime stories...<n>Everyone
needs me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I have to be there for them...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Creek...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You can leave all of that to me! I'll<n>look after
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But... but that means I won't get to<n>pamper... No, I
mean—I would hate to<n>cause you trouble, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, it's no trouble at all! Iwant to help!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I wish I could look after them<n>myself... but
okay.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you, I'm sure you'll be a<n>great mommy
for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll try my best!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, hi! I'm here to deliver your<n>lunch box on
Creek's behalf.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you... arrange the food to look like<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Creek suggested I make<n>something you can
have fun eating. I<n>jam-packed it with all your
favorite<n>foods! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. Thank you. Hehe, it's very<n>cute.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Taishin, your training partner has<n>arrived!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Didn't Creek leave school<n>early today?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's why I'm here to run with<n>you
instead! I can hold my own up to<n>medium
distance—promise!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-all right, all right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya really don't gotta do this,<n>y'know...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. I'm here in Creek's<n>stead! I'll
massage all your fatigue<n>away!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Thanks a bunch. You're real<n>considerate,
aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, Creek told me to give you a<n>thorough
massage after training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then after that, I think she said...<n>to give you
a pat on the head for good<n>measure?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The heck ya will!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower's day of<n>being a mommy
comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was more tiring than I<n>expected.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Creek is amazing. She helps out so<n>many people.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She was there for me too, when I first<n>arrived at
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was feeling lonely, but she told me I<n>could rely
on her as if she were my<n>own mother. It was so
reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to be just as reliable as she is<n>one day.
choice_data_list: It's easy to see your heart's in it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to be just as reliable as she is<n>one day.
choice_data_list: It's easy to see your heart's in it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My approach was probably different<n>from
Creek's... but I hope the others<n>found it just as
helpful. ♪
choice_data_list: You should have more confidence in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, and um... I did something for you<n>too...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This is a potpourri that I made, full of<n>scents to
relieve fatigue. If you'd like,<n>it's yours!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, I'm able to enjoy a<n>productive
work session thanks to the<n>potpourri Nishino
Flower gave me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I hope so! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you free? I brought<n>some
homegrown tea leaves with me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I was wondering if you'd like to try<n>them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The tea Nishino Flower brews for me<n>is delicious.
Her gratitude toward me<n>for accompanying her
today is<n>apparent in every sip.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! After today, I feel like I've<n>gotten a
little closer to getting there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When I grow up, I want to be just as<n>kind and
dependable as Creek! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There, there. Mommy's here for you,<n>honey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm here too! So... just relax and let<n>us spoil
you, okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, is something wrong?
choice_data_list: It's nothing. Just... don't go overboard, all right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That sudden fever dream... Could it<n>have been a
sign of things to come?
